'''Can Lar''' was a [[Gathi]] who worked for [[CoMar Combat Systems/Legends|CoMar Combat Systems]]. While there he designed the [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]]; however, CoMar rejected it, stating that it was useless and impossible to build. Lar quit CoMar and was hired by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], who produced his design.
